title: chrysopsis gossypina subsp. hyssopifolia
intro: Chrysopsis gossypina subsp. hyssopifolia, also known as Golden Gayfeather, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is a flowering plant native to North America, known for its golden flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Chrysopsis gossypina subsp. hyssopifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to promote overall health and well-being, while also providing relief from respiratory issues and skin irritations.
